text: Up early, checking the advisory. 8 inches at Rendezvous Bowl overnight, wind loading on the lee sides.
Ugh that early. You want me to grab coffee before Snow King?
Yeah, black for me. Shift starts 6, probably route Cody Bowl closed till we get control work done.
Ha, don't let the mountain hear you complaining about its own name twin. See you at the lot.
Ha ha. Off Thursday still good for us, thinking we hit that new bakery on Broadway.
Deal. Bring Kyle if he's still in town, he keeps asking about your forecasting job anyway.
yo did you actually hit legs at Snow King this morning or just coffee and vibes again
hit legs. wrecked. Jake Tanner had us doing sled pulls up the access road too
brutal lol. hows the snowpack looking, worth me coming up this weekend
6 inches overnight, wind loaded the aspect off cody bowl ridge. patrol's doing control work early, should open by 10
perfect ill time it. tell cody im bringing dads old thermos she keeps stealing
haha shes not giving that back. see you sat
Got 14 inches overnight up here. Spent the morning doing control work before we opened Rendezvous Bowl.
Jesus. You throwing charges yourself or just calling it in?
Both today. Jake Tanner had me on the gun crew.
Careful out there. You still hitting Snow King Fitness this week or is patrol eating all your hours?
Squeezing in a session Thursday. Legs are toast from bootpacking all that new snow.
Ha, sounds about right. Tell Cody I said hi, your mother wants you two over for dinner soon.
